label: Panel
summary: The general-purpose box: groove border with a title riding the line, fieldset-style.
era: The groove-bordered group box with its label sitting on the line, system settings dialogs taught every homepage this shape.

classes.name: rs-panel
classes.role: the box: 2px groove border, content padding

classes.name: rs-panel__title
classes.role: title riding the border line, legend-style

a11y: Use a real heading for the title; when the box groups form controls, build it on <fieldset> with the title as <legend> instead.
